strengths: Familiar with LapAR Pro system interface and setup procedures
weaknesses: No actual task performance to evaluate
Unable to assess precision cutting technique

drills.name: Circle tracking quarter-cuts
drills.description: Cut the circle in four controlled quadrants while maintaining traction on actual gauze material.
drills.targets_weakness: Need to practice actual cutting technique on task materials.

drills.name: Traction-angle practice
drills.description: 10 repetitions of repositioning the Maryland to improve scissor entry angle during precision cuts.
drills.targets_weakness: Develop proper instrument coordination for cutting tasks.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting system familiarity into actual task performance with gauze cutting and precision control.
